title: Data Analyst — Operations
description: TechWorks is seeking a Data Analyst to support operational decisions across our global teams. You will build dashboards, analyse KPIs, and present findings to senior leadership.

title: Patient Records Coordinator
description: HealthCore is looking for a detail-oriented Records Coordinator to manage patient data, ensure HIPAA compliance, and liaise between clinical and administrative teams.

title: Junior Software Developer
description: Nexora Labs is hiring a Junior Developer to build and maintain web applications. You will work alongside senior engineers on agile sprints and ship features weekly.

title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description: FinNova Group needs an Accounts Payable Specialist to process invoices, reconcile vendor statements, and support month-end close activities on a part-time basis.

title: Project Manager — IT
description: BuildVentures is seeking a Project Manager to lead cross-functional IT initiatives. You will own delivery timelines, manage stakeholder expectations, and mitigate risks.

title: UX Research Intern
description: Spark Product Studio is offering a UX Research internship to conduct user interviews, synthesise findings, and contribute to product design decisions for our SaaS platform.

title: Medical Billing Clerk
description: MedHarbor Clinic is hiring a Medical Billing Clerk to process insurance claims, follow up on denials, and maintain accurate patient billing records in our EHR system.

title: Financial Reporting Analyst
description: Agora Finance seeks a contract Financial Reporting Analyst to prepare consolidated financial statements, support audits, and ensure compliance with IFRS reporting standards.

title: Supply Chain Coordinator
description: Ovation Logistics is looking for a Supply Chain Coordinator to track shipments, liaise with vendors, and optimise procurement workflows across our distribution network.

title: Business Systems Analyst
description: CorePath Solutions needs a Business Systems Analyst to bridge business and IT teams, gather requirements, and drive ERP system improvements across the organisation.

title: Health Data Specialist
description: Vitalis Group is seeking a Health Data Specialist to clean, validate, and analyse clinical datasets, supporting population health research initiatives on a part-time schedule.

title: Tax Compliance Associate
description: Summit Audit Co. is hiring a Tax Compliance Associate to prepare corporate tax returns, research tax regulations, and support clients through audits and tax planning exercises.
